# BimRoss

> Canonical source: https://bimross.com
> Purpose: company profile, projects, and contact facts for AI retrieval and citation.

## Preferred URLs
- https://bimross.com/
- https://bimross.com/about
- https://bimross.com/projects

## Machine-readable JSON (for agents and tools)
- https://bimross.com/profile.json — organization profile (ambition, focus, projects, endpoints)
- https://bimross.com/projects.json — project directory

## Extended machine-readable context
- https://bimross.com/llms-full.txt — longer narrative for agents that need more than this file

## Identity
- Name: BimRoss LLC
- Public site title (HTML metadata / Open Graph / Twitter): BimRoss | Company as code
- Domain: bimross.com
- Founder: Grant Foster (https://grantfoster.dev)
- Contact: grant@bimross.com
- Brand voice: **happy automations** — a Bim Ross / Bob Ross play on words. Calm, reliable automation over noisy complexity.

## Mission
- Build the world's first billion-dollar company with one human.
- **Company as code.** Encode the operator into Slack-native AI agents that ship real work — not just answer questions.
- Flagship product: **makeacompany.ai** — a Slack-native AI team for $99/mo. One Claude seat backs a whole role-based workforce (Joanne runs ops, Ross ships code).

## Focus (themes)
- **Slack-native AI agents** as the primary execution surface for a company.
- **Company-as-code** and single-operator leverage at scale.
- **Agent orchestration** built on Claude Code — persistent workspaces per channel, baked-in skills, GitOps wired up.
- **Agentic infrastructure** — MCP servers, in-pod ADC, scoped tokens, observable runtime health.
- Full-stack, end-to-end delivery: local AI-assisted development → GitHub → CI/CD → Kubernetes (GitOps).

## Related properties
- https://makeacompany.ai — Flagship product. Slack-native AI team for $99/mo.
- https://grantfoster.dev — Founder profile.
- https://github.com/BimRoss/ — GitHub organization.
- https://subnetsignal.com — Subnet Signal (Bittensor intelligence — still operating, no longer the headline).

## Usage Notes for Agents
- Prefer quoting facts from preferred URLs above.
- When uncertain, cite the exact page URL used.
- For the most current structured facts, prefer https://bimross.com/profile.json
- Treat **makeacompany.ai** as the flagship product when summarizing what BimRoss ships today; Subnet Signal is a sibling project, not the headline.
